title: juglans regia subsp. fallax
intro: Juglans regia subsp. fallax is a subspecies of the English walnut tree, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. This subspecies is valued for its ability to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems, due to its high levels of antioxidants and essential fatty acids. The medicinal properties of Juglans regia subsp. fallax can be attributed to its kernel, which has been traditionally used in herbal preparations to promote digestive health, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of arthritis. Herbal preparations of Juglans regia subsp. fallax can be consumed in capsule or oil form, and are also used topically to treat skin conditions and promote wound healing.
